## nsc base-image optimize

Triggers the optimization of a base image.

```
nsc base-image optimize [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help               help for optimize
      --image_ref string   Which image ref to optimize.
      --site string        Which site to optimize on. Leave blank for Namespace to decide.
```

* [nsc base-image](nsc_base-image.md)	 - Operations for managing your base images.
